15 WOODLANDS LOOP
#02-55
SINGAPORE 738322

TEL: +65 6815 9119
FAX: +65 6899 4260
EMAIL: ENQUIRY@HOUSEOFCATERING.COM.SG

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”2_3″ _builder_version=”3.29.3″][et_pb_text _builder_version=”3.29.3″ width=”100%” min_height=”83px” custom_padding=”7px|25px||||”]

Thank you for your kind interest in House Of Catering F&B Pte Ltd.

If you have any enquiries or would like to request for further information regarding our products and services, please feel free to contact us. We will attend to your request as soon as possible.
